Chinese: 平台是一种表面。(platform) / 大浅盘是一种盘子。(platter) / 玩耍是一种活动。(play) / 玩伴聚会是一种聚会。(playdate) / 橡皮泥是一种模型材料。(playdough) / 顽皮的小狗是狗。(playful) / 游乐场是一个游乐区域。(playground) / 游戏室是一个房间。(playroom) / 游戏时间是一段时间。(playtime) / 令人愉快的味道是一种风味。(pleasant)

Now ensure each line is non-empty. I think they are.

Now produce JSON. I'll list files in order of batch: platform, platter, play, playdate, playdough, playful, playground, playroom, playtime, pleasant.

Now output JSON.
